button.uploadImageUrl.description: Button text for uploading an image (simplified to 'Upload')

button.extend.description: Button text indicating to extend the video

button.buyMore.description: Button text allowing users to purchase more credits

button.select.description: Button text allowing users to select an option

button.uploadReferences.description: Button text allowing users to upload references

button.success.description: Button text indicating the operation was successful

button.generating.description: Button text indicating the operation is in progress

button.failed.description: Button text indicating the operation failed

button.download.description: Button text allowing users to download the result

button.fast.description: Button text allowing users to set 'fast mode' for image generation

button.relax.description: Button text allowing users to set 'slow mode' for image generation

button.turbo.description: Button text allowing users to set 'turbo mode' for image generation

button.more.description: Button text allowing users to see more options

button.generate.description: Button text allowing users to generate an image

button.history.description: Button text allowing users to view the history of generated images

button.generateNew.description: Button text that allows the user to create a new image

field.finalPrompt.description: Final drawing prompt used to generate the image

field.elements.description: Drawing style used to generate the image

field.traceId.description: Trace ID used to track the image generation request, do not translate, keep as 'Trace ID'

field.elapsed.description: Time taken for the task (in seconds)

field.action.description: Name of the action performed by the request (e.g., generate / extend)

field.on.description: Text displayed when the boolean parameter is true

field.off.description: Text displayed when the boolean parameter is false

description.model.message: Select the model for generating images; General is suitable for most scenarios, Niji is suitable for anime style.

description.loop.message: Enable looping for the generated video.

description.aspect.message: --aspect, change the aspect ratio of the generated image; the default depends on the model and mode.
description.aspect.description: Description of the aspect ratio parameter

description.elements.message: Select style elements for generating the image.

description.chaos.message: --chaos, adjust the level of variation in the generated image; the higher the number, the more unique and unexpected the image, range is 0-100, default is 1.

description.fast.message: Ignore current settings and run a single generation task in 'fast mode'; no default value.

description.iw.message: --iw, set the importance of the image prompt relative to the text prompt during the generation process; range is 0-2, default is 1.

description.no.message: --no, indicates the generation system to try to exclude certain elements; for example, '--no plants' will attempt to generate an image without plants; no default value.
description.no.description: Description of the exclusion parameter, translate to 'Exclude'

description.quality.message: --quality, set the quality and rendering time of the generated image; range is .25, .5, or 1, default is 1.

description.random.message: Add random base style codes to the prompt; you can use '--style random-16', '--style random-64', or '--style random-128' for different lengths of random style effects; no default value.

description.relax.message: Override current settings and run a single task in 'relax mode'; no default value.

description.repeat.message: --repeat, create multiple tasks from a single prompt; range is 1-40, default is 1.

description.seed.message: --seed, initial visual noise for generating the image; range is 0-4294967295, default is randomly generated.

description.stop.message: --stop, stop the task at any stage of the generation process; range is 10-100, default is 100 (i.e., fully generated).

description.style.message: --style, switch between different versions or styles of the Midjourney or Niji model, such as raw, cute, expressive, original, scenic; default depends on the model and mode.

description.stylize.message: --stylize, adjust the strength of the Midjourney default aesthetic style applied in the generation task; range is 0-1000, default is 100.

description.tile.message: --tile, generate images suitable for creating seamless tiles; no default value.

description.turbo.message: Override current settings and run a single task in 'turbo mode'; no default value.

description.weird.message: --weird, explore unusual aesthetic styles with experimental nature; range is 0-3000, default is 0.

description.imageUrl.message: In tasks creating videos, an image must be uploaded.

description.endImageUrl.message: In tasks creating videos, you can specify an image as the end frame to generate.

description.imageUrl2.message: In tasks creating descriptive images, an image must be uploaded.

description.translation.message: Enable automatic translation during generation; non-Chinese content will be automatically translated to Midjourney's English input.

description.imageWeight.message: --iw, adjust the weight of the image prompt relative to the text prompt, range 0-2, default is 1
description.imageWeight.description: Description of the image weight parameter

description.niji.message: --niji, when enabled, the generated image will use the Niji model to create anime-style images

description.uploadReferences.message: Upload images as references for generation, supports up to 5 images. If more than 1 image is uploaded, they will be automatically merged
description.uploadReferences.description: Description of the upload reference parameter

description.raw.message: --raw, when enabled, the generated image will use the Midjourney model to create raw-style images

description.prompt.message: Enter the command; if additional parameters are added, they will override the default preset parameters, for example, adding '--stylize 200' will force the final command to use '--stylize 200'

action.generate.message: Click this button to start generating the image

action.variation_strong.description: Description of the strong variation button

action.variation_subtle.description: Description of the subtle variation button

action.upscale_creative.description: Description of the creative upscale button

action.upscale_subtle.description: Description of the subtle upscale button

action.redo_upscale_creative.description: Description of the redo creative upscale button

action.redo_upscale_subtle.description: Description of the redo subtle upscale button

action.zoom_out_2x.description: Description of the 2x zoom out button

action.zoom_out_1_5x.description: Description of the 1.5x zoom out button

action.pan_left.description: Description of the pan left button

action.pan_up.description: Description of the pan up button

action.pan_down.description: Description of the pan down button

action.pan_right.description: Description of the pan right button

action.zoom_in_2x.description: Description of the 2x zoom in button

action.zoom_in_1_5x.description: Description of the 1.5x zoom in button

action.redo_upscale_2x.description: Description of the redo 2x upscale button

action.redo_upscale_4x.description: Description of the redo 4x upscale button

message.imageUrlRequired.description: Error message when the first frame image is missing

message.promptPlaceholder.message: Please enter a description of the image or video you want to generate, e.g., a cute cat. Additional parameters will override the default preset parameters
message.promptPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the prompt field

message.uploadReferencesExceed.message: You can upload a maximum of 5 images
message.uploadReferencesExceed.description: Error message when the number of uploaded images exceeds the limit

message.uploadReferencesSuccess.description: Success message when an image is uploaded successfully

message.uploadReferencesError.message: Image upload failed, please try again later
message.uploadReferencesError.description: Error message when image upload fails

message.startingTask.description: Message when the drawing task starts

message.startTaskSuccess.description: Success message when the drawing task is successfully started

message.startVideosTaskSuccess.description: Success message when video generation task starts

message.startDescribeTaskSuccess.description: Success message when image description task starts

message.promptRequired.description: Error message when the prompt is missing

message.startTaskFailed.description: Error message when drawing task cannot start

message.startVideosTaskFailed.message: Failed to start video generation task
message.startVideosTaskFailed.description: Error message when video generation task cannot start

message.startDescribeTaskFailed.message: Failed to start image description task
message.startDescribeTaskFailed.description: Error message when image description task cannot start

message.generating.description: Message displayed while image is being generated

message.uploadStartImageExceed.message: Too many start frame images uploaded
message.uploadStartImageExceed.description: Error when uploaded start frame images exceed the limit

message.uploadEndImageExceed.message: Too many end frame images uploaded
message.uploadEndImageExceed.description: Error when uploaded end frame images exceed the limit

message.uploadStartImageError.description: Error when start frame image upload fails

message.uploadEndImageError.description: Error when end frame image upload fails

message.noOperations.description: Message when no actions are available

message.noTasks.message: No history tasks, please start a new one
message.noTasks.description: Message when no history tasks exist

message.usedUp.message: You’ve used all your credits. Purchase more to continue
message.usedUp.description: Message when user has no remaining credits

model.general.description: Model name for general image generation

model.niji.description: Model name for anime-style image generation, do not translate

tab.images.description: Name of the image generation tab

tab.videos.description: Name of the video generation tab

tab.describe.description: Name of the image description tab

name.resolution.description: Quality of the video to generate

name.imageUrl.description: Name of the start frame image

name.endImageUrl.description: Name of the end frame image

name.model.description: Name of the model used to generate images

name.chaos.description: Parameter for chaos, translated as 'Chaos Level'

name.nijiStyle.description: Parameter name for Niji style, do not translate

name.random.description: Parameter to add random style effects

name.repeat.description: Parameter to create multiple tasks from one prompt

name.seed.description: Name of the seed parameter, used to set the initial visual noise

name.stop.description: The name of the stop parameter, used to stop a task at any stage

name.style.description: The name of the style parameter, used to switch between different versions or styles of the model

name.stylize.description: The name of the stylize parameter, used to adjust the intensity of the default aesthetic style

name.tile.description: The name of the tile parameter, used to generate images suitable for tiling

name.turbo.description: The name of the turbo mode, used to generate images in 'turbo' mode

name.weird.description: The name of the weirdness parameter, used to explore uncommon aesthetic styles

name.translation.description: The name of the translation parameter, used to enable automatic translation during generation

name.advanced.description: The name of the advanced mode, used to enable advanced settings

name.niji.description: The name of the niji parameter, used to enable the Niji model; do not translate

name.ignore.description: The name of the ignore parameter, used to exclude certain elements

name.prompt.description: The name of the prompt parameter, used to input drawing instructions

name.raw.description: The name of the raw parameter, used to enable the Midjourney model

placeholder.prompt.message: Enter a brief description of the image or video you want to generate, e.g., a cute cat. Additional parameters will override default presets
placeholder.prompt.description: Placeholder text for the prompt field

placeholder.ignore.message: Enter elements to ignore, e.g., type 'car' if you don’t want cars in the image
placeholder.ignore.description: Placeholder text for the ignore field

status.pending.description: A task status indicating it has not started yet

status.describePending.description: A task status indicating it has not started yet

status.describeComplete.description: A task status indicating it has not started yet

name.hd.description: The name of the HD image parameter; V8 supports generating 2K resolution images

description.hd.message: Enable HD mode to generate 2K resolution images (V8 only), costs 4x points

button.ultra.description: Label for ultra-high quality button (V8 --q 4), costs 4x points
